page_content:
Formerly: PUAF774.

PLCY780 The American Foreign Policy-Making Process (3 Credits) Survey and analysis of the governmental institutions and processes which shape U.S. global engagement on national security and international economic issues. Particular emphasis is given to executive- congressional relations and the broader domestic roots of foreign policy. Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy; or permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy.

Credit Only Granted for. PLCY780 or PUAF780.
